title: AN ACT TO AMEND SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED ELEVEN TO PROVIDE FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A SHOP BUILDING IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF QUEZON, PROVINCE OF QUEZON.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5231 / 52 OG No. 7, 3528 (July, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1457, June 14, 1956 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED ELEVEN TO PROVIDE FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A SHOP BUILDING IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF QUEZON, PROVINCE OF QUEZON.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item fifty-one, roman numbered two, subsection

aq.

Quezon, section three of Republic Act Numbered One thousand four hundred eleven, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"51. Quezon Central School Shop BuildingâConstruction ........................ P3,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 14, 1956.
